item.body:
## What's Changed
### Import / Export - **Import/Export** — Dragging data types, tag tables, or technology objects onto the export panel now exports them.
### Compare - **Compare** — Dragging data types or tag tables into Compare now loads them.
### Find Unused - **Find Unused** — Deleting unused tags removes them from the project and reports any that cannot be removed. - **Find Unused** — Warns you if the project could not be saved after removing unused items. - **Find Unused** — Status and dialog messages appear in your selected language.
